error_signature: 400 error saying ““ is not a valid property
title: Invalid property error in HubSpot Create Deal Node
symptom: When using the HubSpot Create Deal node with an internal ID as a string, a 400 error occurs stating that the property is not valid.
applies_when: Passing internal ID as a string in expressions
not_this_if: Using internal ID as an integer
Not using expressions in the input
root_cause: The HubSpot Create Deal node does not correctly interpret string expressions when they are enclosed in curly braces, leading to a 400 error when the expression evaluates to an empty string.
fix_steps: Remove the curly braces from the internal ID when entering it in the node.
Use the internal ID as plain text, e.g., 'qualifiedtobuy' instead of '{{ qualifiedtobuy }}'.
agent_instruction: Enter the internal ID as plain text without curly braces in the HubSpot Create Deal node.
